name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: File and Directory Discovery - Linux
notes:
This Building Block detects usage of system utilities to discover files and directories.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: File and Directory Discovery - Linux
SIGMA Description: Detects usage of system utilities to discover files and directories


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: File and Directory Discovery - Linux on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches (LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%file' and "command" imatches '.{200,}') or (LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%ls' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-r|grep%') or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%find' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%tree' or (LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%locate' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%*%') or (LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%which' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%sh%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: File and Directory Discovery - Linux on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%file' and "command" imatches '.{200,}') or (LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%ls' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-r|grep%') or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%find' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%tree' or (LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%locate' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%*%') or (LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%which' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%sh%') AQL filter query
